label_verbatim: (A ___ Corporation) — first participating corp name (top recital)
rationale: Wide name field (rect y=667-679, width 254pt) — name of the first participating corporation in the recital triad.

label_verbatim: (A ___ Corporation) — first participating corp descriptor
rationale: Narrow descriptor/type field (y=656-663, width 122pt) directly under field 1 — fills the '(A ___ Corporation)' adjective slot, e.g., 'Maine non-profit', 'Delaware non-profit'.

label_verbatim: (A ___ Corporation) — second participating corp name
rationale: Wide name field (y=620-633, width 252pt) — name of the second participating corporation.

label_verbatim: (A ___ Corporation) — second participating corp descriptor
rationale: Narrow descriptor field (y=609-616, width 122pt) under field 3 — second corp's adjective slot.

label_verbatim: (A ___ Corporation) FORMING — new consolidated corp name
rationale: Wide name field (y=555-571, width 255pt) under the 'FORMING' label — name of the NEW corporation being formed by the consolidation.

label_verbatim: (A ___ Corporation) FORMING — new corp descriptor
rationale: Narrow descriptor field (y=544-552, width 120pt) under field 5 — adjective slot for the new corporation.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The laws of the State(s) of ___, under which the foreign corporation(s) is (are) organized, permit said corporation(s) and the domestic corporation(s) to consolidate.
rationale: FIRST clause inline blank (y=463) — state(s) of organization for the foreign participating corporation(s).

label_verbatim: (A ___ Corporation) FORMING — new consolidated corp name
rationale: SECOND clause re-states the new entity name (y=403). Same canonical key as field 5 — multiple widgets bind to the same value (filler populates both).

label_verbatim: SECOND: ...and it is to be governed by the laws of the State of ___
rationale: SECOND clause governing-law state (y=391) — the state whose laws will govern the new consolidated corporation.

label_verbatim: SECOND: ...the address to which the Secretary of State shall mail a copy of any process in such proceeding is ___
rationale: SECOND clause service-of-process address (y=330) — used when the new corp is governed by laws other than Maine.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The plan of consolidation is set forth in Exhibit ___ attached hereto and made a part hereof.
rationale: Tiny inline single-letter exhibit blank (y=296, width ~19pt) — letter of the exhibit containing the plan of consolidation.

label_verbatim: (A ___ Corporation) — first participating corp name (top recital)
rationale: FOURTH header re-states the domestic participating corp name (y=235, wide). Binds to the same canonical key as field 1 (parties[0].name) — FOURTH adoption-manner block applies per-party. Form layout supports only one FOURTH block inline; additional domestic parties go on attached exhibits.

label_verbatim: FOURTH option 1: [ ] By the members at a meeting on (date) ___ at which a quorum was present and such plan received at least a majority of the votes which members were entitled to cast.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum value 'majority_member_vote'. Paired with date widget field 14 by y-proximity (Check Box8 y=206, field 14 y=211 — same row).

label_verbatim: FOURTH option 1: [ ] By the members at a meeting on (date) ___ at which a quorum was present and such plan received at least a majority of the votes which members were entitled to cast.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum value 'supermajority_member_vote'. Paired with date widget field 16 (y=170 vs y=161 — same row).

label_verbatim: FOURTH option 1: [ ] By the members at a meeting on (date) ___ at which a quorum was present and such plan received at least a majority of the votes which members were entitled to cast.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum value 'written_consent_of_members'. Paired with date widget field 18 (y=122 vs y=115 — same row).

label_verbatim: FOURTH option 1: [ ] By the members at a meeting on (date) ___ at which a quorum was present and such plan received at least a majority of the votes which members were entitled to cast.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive enum value 'board_of_directors_majority_vote' (used when there are no voting members). Paired with date widget field 20 (y=84 vs y=78 — same row).

label_verbatim: FOURTH option 1 date: ...at a meeting on (date) ___
rationale: Adoption date for option 1 (majority_member_vote). y=211, paired with Check Box8 (y=206). Same canonical key as fields 16/18/20 — only the widget matching the selected adoption_method is filled.

label_verbatim: FOURTH option 1 date: ...at a meeting on (date) ___
rationale: Adoption date for option 2 (supermajority_member_vote). y=161, paired with Check Box9 (y=170). Note: option 2 ALSO requires a percentage value, but the percentage blank ('the percentage of votes ___ of the members') is missing from the AcroForm — see open_questions.

label_verbatim: FOURTH option 1 date: ...at a meeting on (date) ___
rationale: Adoption date for option 3 (written_consent_of_members). y=115, paired with Check Box11 (y=122). Resolved per visual review of page-00.png: this widget is on the same line as Check Box11, not the option-2 percentage blank (which is missing from AcroForm).

label_verbatim: FOURTH option 1 date: ...at a meeting on (date) ___
rationale: Adoption date for option 4 (board_of_directors_majority_vote). y=78, paired with Check Box13 (y=84).

label_verbatim: (A ___ Corporation) — first participating corp name (top recital)
rationale: FIFTH clause re-states the domestic party's name (y=739). Binds to the same canonical key as field 1 (parties[0].name).

label_verbatim: FIFTH (domestic): ...is: ___ (inline trailing blank ending the sentence)
rationale: Inline trailing blank ending the FIFTH-domestic sentence (y=714). Combined with line 2 (field 23) for the full address.

label_verbatim: FIFTH (domestic): ___ (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Wide labeled line below the FIFTH-domestic sentence (y=691) — the full street/city/state/zip address.

label_verbatim: (A ___ Corporation) — second participating corp name
rationale: FIFTH clause re-states the foreign party's name (y=663). Binds to the same canonical key as field 3 (parties[1].name).

label_verbatim: FIFTH (foreign): ...is:* ___ (inline trailing blank)
rationale: Inline trailing blank ending the FIFTH-foreign sentence (y=638). Combined with line 2 (field 26) for the full address. Asterisk in label refers to bottom-of-page footnote: '*Give address of registered office in Maine. If the corporation does not have a registered office in Maine, the address given should be the principal place of business...'.

label_verbatim: FIFTH (foreign): ___ (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Wide labeled line below the FIFTH-foreign sentence (y=615) — the full street/city/state/zip address.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: Effective date of the consolidation (if later than date of filing of Articles) is ___ (Not to exceed 60 days from date of filing of the Articles)
rationale: Optional future effective date capped at 60 days post-filing per 13-B MRSA §906. y=581, narrow right-aligned (x=404-573).

label_verbatim: DATED ___ (signature block 1, left column)
rationale: Block-1 DATED line (y=541, left column, narrow width 125pt). Per critique: this was previously misclassified by the drafter as filing.date_signed; correct semantics is per-party DATED.

label_verbatim: (name of corporation) — signature block 1, right column
rationale: Block-1 corporation-name re-statement on the DATED row (y=540, right column). Confirms which party this signature block is for.

label_verbatim: **By ___ (signature) — signature block 1
rationale: Block-1 signature widget (y=475, /Tx widget). Wet-ink signature; synth typically leaves blank. Mapped for completeness; treat as optional in fill.

label_verbatim: (type or print name and capacity) — signature block 1
rationale: Block-1 printed name + capacity (y=407, e.g., 'Jane Smith, President').

label_verbatim: DATED ___ (signature block 2, left column)
rationale: Block-2 DATED line (y=355, left column, narrow width 125pt). Per critique: drafter previously mis-mapped this as block-2 corporation_name; correct is DATED.

label_verbatim: (name of corporation) — signature block 2, right column
rationale: Block-2 corporation-name re-statement on the DATED row (y=356, right column).

label_verbatim: **By ___ (signature) — signature block 2
rationale: Block-2 signature widget (y=287). Wet-ink; synth leaves blank.

label_verbatim: (type or print name and capacity) — signature block 2
rationale: Block-2 printed name + capacity (y=223). Per critique: drafter previously mis-mapped this as a duplicate filing.date_signed; correct is per-party printed_name_and_capacity.
